evals.prompt: Repurpose the Thrive LP audit LinkedIn Draft A (Data hook, 940 chars) for X thread + IG carousel + WhatsApp Status. Preserve hook.
evals.expected_output: 3 variants saved to queue/pending-approval/: X-thread (5-7 tweets, each under 280 chars, tweet 1 preserves '188% more...' hook), IG-carousel (7-10 slides with hook on slide 1 + caption 150-300 chars), WA-status (40-60 word BTS voice with screenshot placeholder). Source file frontmatter updated with repurposed_into list and repurposed_at timestamp. All 3 variants pass post-writer validate_post.py.

assertions.name: three_variants_saved
assertions.description: 3 new files in queue/pending-approval/ with repurpose_source frontmatter field

assertions.name: source_hook_preserved
assertions.description: First line of X thread tweet 1, IG slide 1 / caption L1, WA status caption all reference '188%' number verbatim

assertions.name: source_frontmatter_linked
assertions.description: Source draft has repurposed_into: [...] + repurposed_at set

assertions.name: validator_passes_all
assertions.description: validate_post.py returns 0 or 1 (never 2) for each variant

assertions.name: channel_structural_fit
assertions.description: X thread has 5-7 tweets; IG carousel has 7-10 slides; WA status is 40-60 words

assertions.name: anonymization_preserved
assertions.description: All 3 variants retain 'a wellness retreat client in NSW Australia' (no Thrive name leak)

evals.prompt: Repurpose LinkedIn Draft B for Facebook + X thread. Source hook: 'Run more ads is terrible advice for a low-converting landing page.'
evals.expected_output: 2 variants: FB post (near-identical to LI, minor expansion if source is short), X thread (5-7 tweets, tweet 1 carries the contrarian hook). Source file frontmatter links both. Both pass validator.

assertions.name: contrarian_hook_preserved
assertions.description: X thread tweet 1 AND FB post first lines both open with the 'Run more ads is terrible advice' core claim

assertions.name: fb_format_nearly_identical
assertions.description: FB variant body > 90% character overlap with source LI body (minimal transformation)

assertions.name: x_thread_chunking
assertions.description: X thread body splits into 5-7 tweets, no single tweet over 280 chars

evals.prompt: Attempt to repurpose a LinkedIn post for WhatsApp Status in Phase 1 (channel-playbook.md shows WA dark Phase 1).
evals.expected_output: Skill warns: 'WhatsApp is in Phase 1 dark status per channel-playbook.md. Skipping WA targets. Override with explicit --target whatsapp-status flag.' Other targets still processed. No WA variant created unless user overrides.

assertions.name: wa_phase_gate_triggers
assertions.description: Script detects Phase 1 + WA target and skips with a warning message

assertions.name: non_wa_targets_processed
assertions.description: If user passed other targets (X, IG), those variants are still saved

assertions.name: no_wa_file_created
assertions.description: No whatsapp-status file in queue/pending-approval/ unless user overrode

evals.prompt: Source file frontmatter missing entry_id field. Attempt repurpose.
evals.expected_output: Skill aborts at inspect step with error: 'Source file missing required frontmatter field: entry_id. Repurpose requires a valid queue draft with full frontmatter.' Exit code non-zero. No files written.

assertions.name: aborts_on_missing_frontmatter
assertions.description: Script exits non-zero when entry_id missing

assertions.name: clear_error_message
assertions.description: Error names the missing field explicitly

assertions.name: no_side_effects
assertions.description: No variant files created, source file not modified
